title: JP's Crunchy Crit Sounds
description: A pack that makes critical hits much more satisfying.
body:
## 🌊 JP's Crunchy Crit Sounds
A pack that makes critical hits much more satisfying & responsive.
> Supports versions 1.16 -> Latest
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/jkPF6gNrQSw" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

_Comparison of Crunchy Crits vs Vanilla (No resource pack)._

## 🔊 Crunchier than ever!
This resource pack modifies the Vanilla Minecraft Critical hit sounds to make them much more satisfying & responsive while PvPing!
